title: Methods with Pure attribute should return a value
description: Methods with "Pure" attribute should return a valueAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearreliabilityBugWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoMarking a method with thePureattribute indicates that the method doesn’t make any visible state changes. Therefore, aPuremethod should return a result. Otherwise, it indicates a no-operation call.UsingPureon avoidmethod is either by mistake or the method is not doing a meaningful task.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

logic.reasoning: Uses custom function to detect methods marked with [Pure] attribute that have void return types by analyzing the relationship between Attribute nodes and MethodDeclaration nodes. Pure methods should not have side effects and should return a value to be meaningful. Excludes test methods where Pure might be used for testing purposes.

should_not_trigger: [Pure] public string ProcessData(string input) { return input; }
